name: design-ppt
description: Build an APS-Brand-Presentation-System HTML deck into a Korean .pptx (each <section> = one 1920×1080 slide). Default output is editable PowerPoint native objects (textboxes/tables/shapes) via headless-Chrome layout measurement; --mode image bakes pixel-faithful screenshots instead. 14 APS archetypes. Enforces IT전략팀 team rules.
